hooks.command: sh -lc 'if latest=$(npm view @juancr11/sibu version 2>/dev/null); then echo "Sibu latest version: $latest" >&2; else echo "Sibu version check unavailable; continuing to sibu doctor." >&2; fi; sibu doctor >&2 || true; printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"Sibu session health check finished. Review hook output for details.\"}"'
hooks.name: Sibu session health check
